title: Tamsweg Memories

description.text: Nestled in a breathtaking valley, embraced by pristine mountains, winding rivers, and rolling meadows, this commission came to life - a true labor of love.

Every brushstroke held meaning. The towering trees, delicate flowers, the house itself with its familiar warmth, the breathtaking views that stretch beyond the doorstep - all captured in paint. The animals, the beloved pets, even the smallest objects and symbols that carry significance, each detail was carefully placed.

location: Entertainment Space. Private Home. Tamsweg, Austria
